stemHtml:
Which of the following statements regarding alcohol consumption for flight crew are correct?

1. The blood alcohol level during a flight duty period or whilst on standby must always be 0.0 per thousand.
2. No alcohol must be consumed less than 8 hours prior to the specified beginning of the flight duty period.
3. The blood alcohol level at the start of the flight duty period must not exceed 0.2 per thousand.
4. Alcohol consumption during a flight duty period or whilst on standby must be restricted so that the blood alcohol level may never exceed 0.2 per thousand.
